💡 TRY THIS NOW:

• Body Scan for Sleep
  1. Lie in bed, close your eyes
2. Focus attention on your toes, notice sensations
3. Slowly move attention up: feet, legs, stomach, chest, arms, head
4. If your mind wanders, gently return to body awareness
5. Imagine tension melting away from each body part

• Cognitive Shuffle
  1. Pick a random word (like 'BEDTIME')
2. For each letter, think of words starting with that letter
3. Visualize each word for 3-5 seconds
4. B: boat, banana, bird... E: elephant, egg...
5. Continue until you fall asleep

• The 3-Step Clarity Method
  1. Write down EXACTLY what you owe this month (₹ amount)
2. Write down what income you have coming in
3. List 3 possible solutions even if they feel small:
   • Contact lender for payment extension
   • Negotiate due date
   • Ask family/friend for help
   • Skip a non-essential expense
[COPING_TIP_END:0]

[COPING_TIP_START:1]
💡 Want a tip to help with stress? (click to reveal)
[COPING_TIP_CONTENT:1]

• The One Call Method
  1. Call your bank/lender BEFORE you miss payment
2. Say: 'I'm facing temporary difficulty, what options do I have?'
3. Ask about: payment extension, restructuring, grace period
4. Take notes on what they offer
[COPING_TIP_END:1]
